records.name: Memory Shard Extraction
records.description: Players collect memory shards from unstable dream-zone nodes and bank them only after extraction.
records.summary: Turns exploration time into recoverable resources while preserving risk until escape.

records.name: Phase Dash
records.description: Short burst movement ability used to cross unstable dream gaps during extraction.
records.effectSummary: Moves the player through a short hazard gap without interrupting carried shard state.
constraints: Cannot be used while reviving another player.

records.name: Zone Collapse Timer
records.description: Extraction zone fails if players do not reach the portal before collapse completes.
records.condition: Collapse timer reaches zero before the squad extracts.
records.outcome: Carried memory shards are lost and the encounter fails.
records.rationale: Creates an explicit risk decision for collecting one more shard.

records.name: Prototype Zone Collapse
records.description: Greybox encounter where players gather shards and escape through one portal before collapse.
records.objective: Collect three shard bundles and extract before the collapse timer ends.
